CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-12-2003 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Appearance for defendant. Notice having been given and there being no objection or an opposition filed. The court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 225. Proceedings reported by: Valerie Papale. (212)

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-15-2003 Continued To Dec-09-03 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Minor'S Compromise In Scd
Off Calendar Sep-25-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Minor's Compromise hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha/V. Mack, CSR. Margaret Del Coto
Appearances:
Gary A. Peterson, Esq. for Petitioner: Carol Gutierrez, present as guardian ad litem for Tianna Knight, a minor Claimant, was sworn and examined.
On the basis of evidence received, the Court grants the compromise as follows:

Compromise: $5,000.00

Reimbursement of Costs: $2,838.70
Attorney's fees: $540.32

A net balance of $1,620.98 to be deposited into a blocked account with
Bank Of America, Excelsior Branch, 15 Ocean Ave., SF, CA 94112
until minor's reaches the age of 18.
Order signed in open court.
